nasb.text: “Woe to you who make your neighbors drink, Who mix in your venom even to make them drunk So as to look on their nakedness!

esv.text: “Woe to him who makes his neighbors drink— you pour out your wrath and make them drunk, in order to gaze at their nakedness!

cnv.text: 你這請鄰舍喝酒，卻把毒物混入， 使他醉倒， 為要見他赤裸的，有禍了！

ccb.text: “用酒灌醉邻居以观看他们祼体的人啊， 你们有祸了！
